-- [[ Koji HUD: Murder Duels Absolute Combat System ]]
-- Hex Obfuscated Version

local function decode(hex)
    local str = ""
    for i = 1, #hex, 2 do
        local byte = tonumber(hex:sub(i, i+1), 16)
        if byte then
            str = str .. string.char(byte)
        end
    end
    return str
end

local code = ""

loadstring(decode(code))()
